notes: No real client, matter, document, billing, settlement, credential, or secret data was used.
CP00-129 is synthetic-only, metadata-only, and Risk B scoped to Hermes evidence workflow binding for operator summary, secondary workflow evidence, and permission/audit evidence binding rows.
CP00-129 inherits CP128 failure taxonomy evidence harness behavior without executing runtime harnesses or writing state.
Operator summaries remain reference-only and do not render hidden source fields or real data.
Hermes evidence rows remain preview/reference-only and do not write Hermes runtime or audit ledgers.
Permission and audit summaries are reference-only; command result and changed-file receipts do not disclose raw output or raw diffs.
Claude dependency markers are read-only references and do not execute Claude review.
Human approval markers do not grant approval.
PASS, PASS_WITH_FINDINGS, and BLOCK semantics are metadata-only, with BLOCK preventing production_ready.
Closeout handoff rows do not commit, approve, or mark production_ready; production_ready is recorded only by this pack evidence set.

No runtime UI/API route, permission policy mutation, product/database write, idempotency persistence, lock acquisition, retry, rollback, compensation, external share/export, AI/analytics execution, LDIP implementation, or HRX split was added.
Unrelated dirty/untracked files were preserved and not included in the active pack.
